text: 108 iterations — mostly agent (parent) calls. It's doing the work itself with very few subagents. Let me wait for it to stabilize.

tool_uses.name: Bash
tool_uses.input: {"command": "RUN_DIR=$(ls -dt /tmp/claude_captures/run_* | head -1) && sleep 60 && PREV=$(ls \"$RUN_DIR\" | grep \"_summary.txt$\" | grep -v response | wc -l) && sleep 30 && CURR=$(ls \"$RUN_DIR\" | grep \"_summary.txt$\" | grep -v response | wc -l) && echo \"Was $PREV, now $CURR — $([ $PREV -eq $CURR ] && echo 'STABLE' || echo 'still running')\"", "description": "Final check", "timeout": 120000}
